preliminary_expected_failure.reason: Before CP00-071 evidence files existed, RP00 validator correctly reported missing manifest, command evidence, Claude review result, adjudication, and construction inspection artifacts for the CP00-071 included units.

claude_review_command.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --system-prompt "You are a read-only code reviewer with no tools. Review only the provided diff. Never say you need to inspect files or run commands. Output the final verdict in the requested structure." --output-format json < /tmp/cp00-071-review-prompt-valid.txt > /tmp/cp00-071-claude-review-output-valid.json

invalid_claude_attempts.reason: Claude returned a planning preamble saying it needed to inspect files and did not provide a verdict, severity counts, findings, or residual risk. It was excluded as an invalid pack-level review attempt.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.
CP00-071 is metadata-only and writes no product state.
Exactly one valid pack-level Claude Opus 4.8 max read-only review was accepted for this pack.
Claude returned P0=0, P1=0, P2=0, P3=3.
Final commands are rerun after these pack evidence files are written so the evidence refs are live.

plan_regeneration.reason: Run after CP00-071 evidence creation to move next queue to CP00-072 without recording it as a validation-only command.
